title: World fleet + team input, in your pocket.
subtitle: For shipbrokers, owners and operators — anyone dealing with shipping information really.

item1.title: Fleet Data
item1.desc: IHS World fleet integrated, BYOD (bring your own data). Quick search or advanced search by ship criteria.

item2.title: Valuations
item2.desc: Automated asset values based on 15 years of comparable sales. See price history and add your own internal estimates.

item3.title: Email + AI
item3.desc: Connect your inbox via IMAP. AI reads every email, links it to the right ship and extracts sale status and enquiries automatically.

item4.title: AIS tracking
item4.desc: Live positions, speed, draught and ETA for every vessel — visible directly from your fleet list without switching tabs.

item5.title: Team collaboration
item5.desc: All your team's logs and notes on each ship, available in seconds. Private to your company. No one else can see it.

item6.title: Pitching tools
item6.desc: Generate clean vessel pitches from ship data in one click. Share or export — ready to send to buyers and sellers.
